summary: Crisp audience tape of a 1974 show highlighted by an epic Playing in the Band and vibrant performances of Row Jimmy, Ship of Fools, Let It Grow and China Doll.
review: The recording captures the full‑sound ambience of a 1974 concert with remarkable clarity for an audience source, even letting the hall’s resonance shine through. Musically the night is anchored by a monster 45‑minute Playing in the Band that many reviewers call spellbinding, plus standout cuts of Row Jimmy, Ship of Fools, Let It Grow and China Doll.

ai_rating.rationale: Most reviews praise both the performance (especially Playing in the Band) and the surprisingly excellent audience recording; a few mixed comments about length keep the rating just above good.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Crisp, full‑sound capture with ambient perception of the hall; minimal crowd bleed except at song starts/ends; many note it sounds better than some board recordings.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The set flows well, opening with high‑energy numbers and building into a marathon Playing in the Band that, while occasionally dragging after 20 minutes, delivers an unforgettable jam.

band_member_comments.Drums: Bill Kreutzmann's hi‑hat work is praised for its precise snap during the China Doll coda.
